title: Technical Blueprint Product Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Technical Blueprint Product Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable technical blueprint product infographic with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable technical blueprint product infographic built around generic mixed-reality headset. technical annotations: lens stack, sensors, strap, battery, cooling path. detail modules: wireframe, exploded part labels, material notes, scale lines. composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Realistic photography or editorial photo language with natural materials, controlled retouching, and believable lighting. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: generic mixed-reality headset as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: deep graphite defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow camera: camera crop and viewpoint are chosen to keep the subject readable and preserve the source prompt perspective materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
imagePrompts.title: Generic Mixed Reality Headset Lens Stack Sensors
